title: Black Forest Labs releases Flux3 multimodal model, first to support 20-second native audio-visual synchronization generation
excerpt: On July 23, the German AI startup Black Forest Labs officially released the multimodal foundation model Flux3, marking a major breakthrough in generative
content_html:
On July 23, the German AI startup Black Forest Labs officially released the multimodal foundation model Flux3, marking a major breakthrough in generative video technology. The model is built on the Self-Flow architecture, featuring dedicated image, video, audio, and motion codecs, enabling unified understanding and generation of physical and digital environments.

As the first model to support native audio generation, Flux3 can output synchronized audio-video clips up to 20 seconds long, covering functions such as text/image/video-to-video conversion, transition based on keyframes, and multilingual dialogue. In early tests at 720p resolution and 10-second clips, Flux3 demonstrated strong competitiveness, outperforming Luma Ray3.2 (93% win rate) and Runway Gen-4.5 (77% win rate), and maintaining a slight advantage over top models like Seedance2.0 and Gemini Omni Flash.

Additionally, the company developed the video action model Flux-mimic for the robotics field in collaboration with Mimic Robotics, which has already begun production task testing in an Audi factory. BFL adopts a phased release strategy, with Flux3Video now available, and Flux3Image and the open-source weight "Flux3Dev" will be released in the near future. By breaking through the limitations of single-modal information, Flux3 is accelerating the advancement of AI toward a "world model" with perception and action capabilities in the physical world.

content_html_zh:
7月23日，德国AI初创公司Black Forest Labs正式发布多模态基础模型Flux3，标志着生成视频技术的重大突破。 该模型建立在自流架构之上，具有专用的图像、视频、音频和运动编解码器，能够统一理解和生成物理和数字环境。

作为首款支持原生音频生成的机型，Flux3 可以输出长达 20 秒的同步音视频片段，涵盖文本/图像/视频到视频转换、基于关键帧的转场、多语言对话等功能。 在早期720p分辨率、10秒片段的测试中，Flux3表现出较强的竞争力，表现优于Luma Ray3.2（胜率93%）和Runway Gen-4.5（胜率77%），并与Seedance2.0和Gemini Omni Flash等顶级机型保持微弱优势。

此外，该公司还与Mimic Robotics合作开发了用于机器人领域的视频动作模型Flux-mimic，并已在奥迪工厂开始生产任务测试。 BFL采取分阶段发布策略，目前已推出Flux3Video，近期将发布Flux3Image以及开源权重“Flux3Dev”。 通过突破单模态信息的限制，Flux3正在加速人工智能向具有物理世界感知和行动能力的“世界模型”迈进。
